title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 5–8, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Luffy’s crew moves closer to Nami’s truth while Arlong’s crew treats the island as their possession.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: sniff...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's a sea moms- terrr- RRP!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Sniff snuff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: came out to the wrong place

dialogue.speaker: Arlong Pirates
dialogue.text: member of the Arlong pirates fighter THE SEA COW MONOO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A cow! It's soooo big!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A cow? And it swims? Isn't that just a.. hippo?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's a creature like this doing in East Blue! It's inconceivable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sniff Sniff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is a grand line monster!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It must want the food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hurry up and just give the food before he overturns our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: GONU GONU: PistOL!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't you dare touch my food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You did it, Brother Luffyy! That was amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Moooo!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aghhhh! It looks like you just made it angrier!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll sock him one more time then!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You dumb- Asses!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Don't just beat up something only for being hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sure it's injured somewhere so it can't find food on its own.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Isn't that right...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Talk about caring on

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Here, eat up.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
